seoTitle: Evelyn vs Everton Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Evelyn and Everton Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Evelyn vs Everton Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Evelyn and Everton Hills.
heading: Evelyn vs Everton Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Evelyn, Queensland and Everton Hills, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Evelyn has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Everton Hills (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Evelyn or Everton Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Evelyn has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Everton Hills scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Evelyn scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Everton Hills scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Evelyn or Everton Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Evelyn has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
